_comment: Reference savings figures captured at release tag. Reproducer (scripts/reproduce-savings.sh) compares each run against these. Regenerate on each release tag where the perf shape intentionally changes; otherwise drift > tolerance fails CI per the methodology doc (docs/methodology/token-savings.md, FILE-A #1520). Initial entries are placeholders sized to the pincher-repo at v0.85 — first published tag updates these.
